creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 242750
py-extract-msg-0.41.5.patch

Description:

ChangeLog:
https://github.com/TeamMsgExtractor/msg-extractor/releases/tag/v0.41.5

* Fixed an issue from version 0.41.3 where the header being present but
  missing the From field would cause an exception.

QA:

* portlint:
  - WARN: Makefile: using hyphen in PORTNAME. consider using PKGNAMEPREFIX and/or PKGNAMESUFFIX.
* testport OK (poudriere: 13.2-RELEASE, amd64, WKHTMLTOPDF tested)
